steps.title: Close the appositive
steps.content: The phrase after Interpol is a nonessential appositive naming the organization. Because it opens with an em dash after Interpol, the blank must close that inserted phrase before in 1923.

steps.title: Match the dash pair
steps.content: Choice A supplies the closing em dash. Choice B uses a comma, which mismatches the opening dash. Choice C leaves the appositive unclosed. Choice D uses a colon, which cannot close an em-dash appositive. The answer is A.
